title: silene nocturna var. permixta
intro: Silene nocturna var. permixta, also known as evening primrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. It is rich in essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and medicinal properties. The GLA in evening primrose oil has been used to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, eczema, and rheumatoid arthritis, providing health benefits such as improved skin health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular well-being. Evening primrose oil is often prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or oil form, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and creams.
